mapper.select: SELECT user_id, user_name AS username, employee_no AS emp_no, dept_code, can_read_contents, active AS active_yn FROM cb_app_user ORDER BY username
SELECT user_id, user_name AS username, employee_no AS emp_no, dept_code, can_read_contents, active AS active_yn FROM cb_app_user WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT u.user_id, u.user_name AS username, r.role_id, r.role_name FROM cb_user_role ur JOIN cb_app_user u ON u.user_id = ur.user_id JOIN cb_app_role r ON r.role_id = ur.role_id ORDER BY u.user_name, r.role_name
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO cb_app_user ( user_id, user_name, employee_no, dept_code, can_read_contents, active ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{command.username}, #{command.empNo}, #{command.deptCode},
'Y' 'N' , 'Y' )
